text: Every company, regardless of its size, always wishes to obtain a large amount of gross profit because gross profit has an influence on net profit and the stability of the company. In fact, if the gross profit is small, then the net profit will also be small, which in turn threatens the survival of the company. In addition to being a factor of determining the financial condition of a company, the gross profit figures also serve as a performance indicator and also for forecasting cash flow of a company. A large gross profit is always wished by every company, because the gross profit has an influence on the net profit of a company, so that the company can still survive. If the gross profit is low, then the net profit will also be low, which can endanger the survival of the company. In addition, the gross profit figures can also be used as a performance indicator and also a cash flow forecast of a company. This study aims to analyze the effect of production costs on the gross profit of a company in various industries. The method used in this research is qualitative descriptive method by utilizing literature review of articles indexed by Sinta in 2018-2024. The results of the analysis show that production costs have a positive and significant effect on gross profit. So that the company must control its production costs so that the values of production costs, goods sold can decrease and the gross profit for the company can increase.
